tasks.label: Quick chat planner dry-run
tasks.command: curl -s -X POST "$env:NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_URL/api/assistant/chat" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "x-dry-run: true" -H "x-planner-mode: llm" -d '{"userId":"test-user","message":"show something for bike"}' | jq .

tasks.label: Planner dry-run (rule mode)
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$body = @{ userId='test-user'; message='show something for bike' } | ConvertTo-Json; Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/api/assistant/chat' -Headers @{ 'x-planner-mode'='rule'; 'x-dry-run'='true'; 'Content-Type'='application/json' } -Body $body | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6"
